creator: dyr@smartspb.net
text:
> Fix:
>
> If pf is completelly turned off, everything is OK.
So don't you want to show "pfctl -sa", for example? Moreover, current
additional information doesn't enough - could you provide crashdump, if
it exist?
Take a look also at /usr/sbin/crashinfo, it gives you a hint for some
diagnostics utils.

---
With best regards,
Dennis Yusupoff,
network engineer of
Smart-Telecom ISP
Russia, Saint-Petersburg
